notes: Ford exterior paints (F150 2024 pilot): original PaintRef Browser harvest paired several chip PNGs to the wrong table rows. Most rows were corrected to LAB from scripts/fetch-nhtsa-colors.ts industry HEX keys (same values as Rapid Red / Carbonized Gray / etc.) or vetted touch-up hex for Avalanche (DR) and Shelter Green (DB). Star White (AZ) and Stone Gray (D1) still use plausible PaintRef chip averages; AZ is tri-coat pearl — treat as approximate on screen.
